children.name: 1. Test Case ID: 9YP7OQ  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/ready` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/ready

1. Test Case ID: QDehDD  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/started` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/started

1. Test Case ID: FtfwWl  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/live` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/live
